creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Florian Walpen from comment #5)

> dbus-run-session

Wouldn't that stop it from working with other programs that use dbus?

In my environment, there seems to be some sort of hint in ~/.dbus/session-bus/* to locate autolaunched dbus-daemon.

I'm not using KDE, so I'm not sure :)
However, qt-related is strange in the way XDG_RUNTIME_DIR is handled.
